service.description: when roomId is null get a list of rooms, otherise a single room with members and messages

set.from: [userId: row.userId, partyId: row.userPartyId, loginName: row.loginName, firstName: row.firstName, lastName: row.lastName, email: row.emailAddress]
[userId: row.userId, partyId: row.userPartyId, loginName: row.loginName, firstName: row.fullName, email: row.emailAddress]
[user: memberUser, hasRead: row.hasRead == 'Y' ? true : false, isActive: row.isActive == 'Y' ? true : false]

[ chatRoomId: roomId, chatRoomName: first.chatRoomName ?: roomName, hasRead: first.myHasRead == 'Y' ? true : false, isPrivate: first.isPrivate == 'Y' ? true : false, visitorUserId: first.visitorUserId, members: members]

service-call.name: create#growerp.general.ChatRoom
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomName: chatRoom.chatRoomName, ownerPartyId: companyPartyId, isPrivate: chatRoom.isPrivate == true ? 'Y' : 'N']

service-call.name: create#growerp.general.ChatRoomMember
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: chatRoomId, isActive: memberIn.isActive == true ? 'Y' : 'N', hasRead: memberIn.hasRead == true ? 'Y' : 'N', userId: memberIn.user?.userId ?: memberIn.userId]

service-call.name: update#growerp.general.ChatRoom
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: chatRoom.chatRoomId, chatRoomName: chatRoom.chatRoomName, isPrivate: chatRoom.isPrivate == true ? 'Y' : 'N']

service-call.name: create#growerp.general.ChatRoomMember
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: chatRoom.chatRoomId, isActive: member.isActive == true ? 'Y' : 'N', hasRead: member.hasRead == true ? 'Y' : 'N', userId: member.user?.userId ?: member.userId]

return.message: Either chatRoomId or ChatMessageId is required to get chat message(s)

set.from: [ chatRoom: [chatRoomId: message.chatRoomId], chatMessageId : message.chatMessageId, fromUserId: message.fromUserId, fromUserFullName: message.fromUserFullName, content: message.content, creationDate: message.lastUpdatedStamp ? ec.l10n.format(message.lastUpdatedStamp,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') : null, ]

[ topic: message.topic, message: [message: mapMessage.message], sentDate: message.sentDate ? ec.l10n.format(message.sentDate,'yyyy-MM-dd') : null, title: message.titleText, link: message.linkText, type: message.typeString, showAlert: message.showAlert == 'Y'? true : false, ]

service.description: Public endpoint for the floating chat button on a generated website. A visitor enters an email and a question. This creates (or reuses) a Lead user for that email, owned by the website's company, then creates a chat room named after the email containing the company admin and the visitor as members, with the question as the first message. No authentication required.

field-map.from: [ firstName: visitorName, lastName: 'website', email: email, role: 'Lead', userGroupId: 'GROWERP_M_LEAD', ]

return.message: Could not create or find a party for email: ${email}

service-call.name: create#moqui.security.UserAccount
service-call.in-map: [partyId: visitorPartyId, username: visitorUsername, userFullName: email, disabled: 'Y', requirePasswordChange: 'N']

service-call.name: create#growerp.general.ChatRoom
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomName: email, ownerPartyId: ownerPartyId, isPrivate: 'N', isActive: 'Y', visitorToken: visitorToken, visitorUserId: visitorUserId, chatAgentConfigId: chatAgentConfigId, agentActive: chatAgentConfigId ? 'Y' : 'N']

service-call.name: growerp.100.ChatServices100.push#WebsiteChatWs
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: chatRoomId, fromUserId: visitorUserId, fromUserFullName: email, content: question, chatMessageId: chatMessageId]

service.description: Push a visitor's chat message to the other room members over the chat WebSocket (ChatEndpoint), so a connected admin's app updates its unread indicator in real time. Mirrors what ChatEndpoint.onMessage broadcasts for app-to-app chat. No-op when no member is connected.

if.script: def msgJson = groovy.json.JsonOutput.toJson([ chatRoom: [chatRoomId: chatRoomId], fromUserId: fromUserId, fromUserFullName: fromUserFullName, content: content, chatMessageId: chatMessageId]) org.moqui.impl.webapp.ChatEndpoint.pushToMembers(msgJson, targetIds)

service.description: Internal helper: validate an anonymous website visitor's access to a chat room. The room must belong to the product store's company (ownerPartyId) and its per-room visitorToken must match. Returns the room and the visitor's userId (the UserAccount whose username equals the room name / visitor email).

return.message: Chat room not found or access denied

service.description: Public endpoint: return the full message thread of a website chat room for an anonymous visitor, after validating the per-room token. The browser polls this and marks the visitor side read.

return.message: Chat room not found or access denied

set.from: [ chatMessageId : message.chatMessageId, fromUserId: message.fromUserId, fromUserFullName: message.fromUserFullName, content: message.content, creationDate: message.lastUpdatedStamp ? ec.l10n.format(message.lastUpdatedStamp,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm') : null, ]

service.description: Public endpoint: an anonymous website visitor posts a follow-up message to their chat room (validated by the per-room token). Marks the other members (the company admin) unread and emails them if offline, mirroring create#ChatMessage.

return.message: Chat room not found or access denied
Visitor account not found for this chat room

service-call.name: growerp.100.ChatServices100.push#WebsiteChatWs
service-call.in-map: [chatRoomId: chatRoomId, fromUserId: visitorUserId, fromUserFullName: room?.chatRoomName, content: content, chatMessageId: chatMessageId]

set.from: [chatMessageId: chatMessageId, fromUserId: visitorUserId, content: content, creationDate: ec.l10n.format(ec.user.nowTimestamp,'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm')]
